translations.en: The beauty of the park calms me.
translations.es: La belleza del parque me tranquiliza.
translations.de: Die Schönheit des Parks beruhigt mich.
translations.it: La bellezza del parco mi calma.
translations.pt: A beleza do parque me acalma.
translations.vi: Vẻ đẹp của công viên khiến tôi thấy bình yên.
translations.nl: De schoonheid van het park kalmeert me.
translations.hi: पार्क की सुंदरता मुझे शांत करती है.
translations.el: Η ομορφιά του πάρκου με ηρεμεί.
translations.ja: 公園の美しさは私を落ち着かせる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking a specific feminine singular noun; agrees with 'beauté'.
Abstract noun; head of the subject NP 'La beauté du parc'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le' (de + le); introduces the complement 'du parc' of 'beauté'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du', specifying the domain of the beauty.
Main verb 'apaiser' in 3rd person singular present with clitic object 'me' elided before vowel; predicates 'La beauté du parc'.

sentences.target: J’aime la beauté des petits gestes.

translations.fr: J’aime la beauté des petits gestes.
translations.en: I like the beauty of small gestures.
translations.es: Me gusta la belleza de los pequeños gestos.
translations.de: Ich mag die Schönheit kleiner Gesten.
translations.it: Mi piace la bellezza dei piccoli gesti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢小小的举动之美。
translations.pt: Gosto da beleza dos pequenos gestos.
translations.he: אני אוהב את היופי שבמחוות קטנות.
translations.vi: Tôi thích vẻ đẹp của những cử chỉ nhỏ.
translations.nl: Ik houd van de schoonheid van kleine gebaren.
translations.hi: मुझे छोटे-छोटे इशारों की सुंदरता पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει η ομορφιά των μικρών χειρονομιών.
translations.nb: Jeg liker skjønnheten i små gester.
translations.sv: Jag gillar skönheten i små gester.
translations.da: Jeg kan lide skønheden i små gestus.
translations.ja: 小さな仕草の美しさが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb 'aimer' in 1st person singular present with elided subject clitic 'je' (j'); introduces a transitive predicate.
Definite article agreeing feminine singular with 'beauté'.
Abstract noun; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'les' (de + les); introduces the complement 'des petits gestes' of 'beauté'.
Attributive adjective; agrees masculine plural with 'gestes'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional complement governed by 'des'.

sentences.target: Tu vois la beauté de ce visage.
sentences.reading: /ty vwa la bote də sə vizaʒ/

translations.fr: Tu vois la beauté de ce visage.
translations.ipa: /ty vwa la bote də sə vizaʒ/
translations.en: You see the beauty of this face.
translations.es: Ves la belleza de este rostro.
translations.de: Du siehst die Schönheit dieses Gesichts.
translations.it: Vedi la bellezza di questo viso.
translations.ko: 너는 이 얼굴의 아름다움을 보고 있다.
translations.pt: Você vê a beleza deste rosto.
translations.he: אתה רואה את היופי שבפנים האלה.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy vẻ đẹp của gương mặt này.
translations.nl: Je ziet de schoonheid van dit gezicht.
translations.hu: Látod ennek az arcnak a szépségét.
translations.hi: तुम इस चेहरे की खूबसूरती देखते हो.
translations.el: Βλέπεις την ομορφιά αυτού του προσώπου.
translations.nb: Du ser skjønnheten i dette ansiktet.
translations.sv: Du ser skönheten i detta ansikte.
translations.da: Du ser skønheden i dette ansigt.
translations.ja: あなたにはこの顔の美しさが見える。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular subject.
Main verb 'voir' in 2nd person singular present; takes 'la beauté de ce visage' as direct object.
Definite article agreeing feminine singular with 'beauté'.
Abstract noun; head of the object NP.
Preposition introducing the nominal complement 'ce visage' of 'beauté'.
Demonstrative determiner; agrees masculine singular with 'visage'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de' within the NP complement.

sentences.target: On cherche la beauté dans les choses simples.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ la bote dɑ̃ le ʃoz sɛ̃pl/

translations.fr: On cherche la beauté dans les choses simples.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ la bote dɑ̃ le ʃoz sɛ̃pl/
translations.en: We look for beauty in simple things.
translations.es: Buscamos la belleza en las cosas sencillas.
translations.de: Wir suchen die Schönheit in den einfachen Dingen.
translations.it: Cerchiamo la bellezza nelle cose semplici.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在简单的事物中寻找美。
translations.yue: 我哋喺簡單嘅事物入面搵美。
translations.ru: Мы ищем красоту в простых вещах.
translations.pt: Procuramos a beleza nas coisas simples.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tìm kiếm vẻ đẹp trong những điều giản đơn.
translations.ar: نبحث عن الجمال في الأشياء البسيطة.
translations.nl: We zoeken schoonheid in eenvoudige dingen.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо красу в простих речах.
translations.hu: A szépséget az egyszerű dolgokban keressük.
translations.hi: हम सरल चीजों में सुंदरता खोजते हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε την ομορφιά στα απλά πράγματα.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter skjønnhet i enkle ting.
translations.id: Kami mencari keindahan dalam hal-hal sederhana.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter skönhet i enkla saker.
translations.da: Vi leder efter skønhed i enkle ting.
translations.ja: 私たちはシンプルなものの中に美しさを探す。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject (often equivalent to 'we' in usage).
Main verb 'chercher' in 3rd person singular present; predicate of 'On'.
Definite article agreeing feminine singular with 'beauté'.
Abstract noun; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing the locative/prepositional complement.
Definite plural article modifying 'choses'.
Common noun; head of the NP governed by 'dans'.
Attributive adjective; agrees plural with 'choses'.
